message:
fix(ft-api): einsum 'ii->i' diagonal pattern delegates to tensor_diagonal autograd

The einsum_unary code path for the 'ii->i' pattern (diagonal
extraction from a square matrix) extracted values, built the
diagonal vector in plain f64, and rebuilt a requires_grad=false
leaf — silently severing autograd. Tensor_diagonal was made
autograd-aware under frankentorch-sirh; delegating to it here
restores gradient flow for the einsum diagonal pattern too.

Trivial 5-line change: replace the inline values+leaf-false
construction with `self.tensor_diagonal(tensor, 0)`.

ft-api lib tests: 1149 passing (no count change; existing
einsum_diagonal_extraction continues to pass since the values
match — only the autograd edge changed).

Followup to frankentorch-sirh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
